source.occupation_series_label: 04. Persons employed 15+ (one-digit groups of individual occupations) (1st Quarter 2001 - 4th Quarter 2025)

groups.title: Legislators, senior officials and managers
groups.label_el: Νομοθέτες, ανώτερα διοικητικά και διευθυντικά στελέχη
groups.description: Leadership, coordination, policy, and organizational decision-making roles across the economy.

groups.title: Professionals
groups.description: Highly skilled professional occupations such as engineers, doctors, lawyers, teachers, and analysts.

groups.title: Technicians and associate professionals
groups.label_el: Τεχνολόγοι, τεχνικοί και ασκούντες συναφή επαγγέλματα
groups.description: Technical support and applied-professional roles bridging theory and hands-on execution.

groups.title: Clerks
groups.description: Administrative, records, customer support, and clerical roles concentrated on office processes.

groups.title: Service workers and shop and market sale workers
groups.label_el: Απασχολούμενοι στην παροχή υπηρεσιών και πωλητές
groups.description: Frontline service, hospitality, retail, and sales occupations with strong person-to-person interaction.
groups.source_label: Service workers and shop and market sale workers

groups.title: Skilled agricultural and fishery workers
groups.label_el: Ειδικευμένοι γεωργοί, κτηνοτρόφοι, δασοκόμοι και αλιείς
groups.description: Skilled occupations in agriculture, livestock, forestry, and fishing tied to land, animals, and physical production.

groups.title: Craft and related trade workers
groups.label_el: Ειδικευμένοι τεχνίτες και ασκούντες συναφή επαγγέλματα
groups.description: Skilled manual trades across construction, repair, fabrication, and installation work.

groups.title: Plant and machine operators and assembler
groups.label_el: Χειριστές εγκαταστάσεων και μηχανημάτων και συναρμολογητές
groups.description: Machine operation, production-line, transport-equipment, and assembly work in industrial settings.
groups.source_label: Plant and machine operators and assembler

groups.title: Elementary occupations
groups.description: Basic manual, support, and low-specialization occupations across many sectors.

groups.title: Other unclassified persons
groups.description: A residual published category for people not assigned to the main occupational group structure.
